quote: The team explained what they found in the attic and why the insulation scope made sense for the house.

title: Contaminated insulation before removal
summary: Photo set showing dirty attic insulation before removal and reset work.
what_was_found: Old insulation was dirty and needed a cleaner reset before reinstall work.
why_scope_changed: The attic needed removal before a simple top-off would make sense.

title: Attic bypasses found during inspection
summary: Inspection summary showing open penetrations and attic leakage points that affected comfort.
what_was_found: Open attic leakage points were documented around penetrations and attic transitions.
why_scope_changed: Air sealing needed to happen before insulation performance could really improve.
